negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_156
prompt: The video opens with a group of young men standing in lines on an indoor soccer field, all dressed in matching tracksuits. They are positioned in the center of the frame, facing slightly towards the camera, suggesting they are either preparing for a practice session or participating in a team activity. The setting is an expansive, well-lit indoor sports facility with a large, white, dome-like ceiling that creates a bright and open atmosphere. The turf of the field is a vibrant green, contrasting sharply with the white surroundings. In front of the players, a yellow agility ladder lies on the ground, indicating they might be about to engage in a training drill. The ladder remains in the same place for the duration of the video. The background reveals additional soccer goals and some scattered equipment, reinforcing the sports environment.  As the video progresses, each player at the front of the two lines begins to move, stepping forward and then running across the field. They appear to be demonstrating a movement or technique, possibly as part of a warm-up or agility drill. The rest of the players remain stationary, observing attentively. The scene continues to unfold with the players' dynamic movement, while the others maintain their positions, indicating a structured and organized training session. The camera angle shifts slightly throughout the video, capturing both wide shots of the entire group and closer views of individual players as they perform their movements. The lighting remains consistent, highlighting the players and the vibrant green turf against the stark white backdrop of the dome ceiling.
